name: Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. frozen spinach, thawed and drained
8 oz. fat-free plain yogurt with acidophilus
2 tbsp. seasoned bread crumbs (1 gram of fat)
2 tbsp. grated Parmesan cheese (3 grams of fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the cream cheese, yogurt, and lemon juice until the cheese is soft and stirrable.
2. Add the thawed and drained spinach to the mixture and stir.
3. Sprinkle the seasoned bread crumbs and grated Parmesan cheese over the top.
4. Reheat the mixture until it is bubbly. Serve 4 portions, with approximately 1 gram of fat per serving. You can verify this with your recipe software if desired.
